debug_info.goal:
S : HarmonicOscillator
IC : ClassicalMechanics.HarmonicOscillator.InitialConditions
t : Time
hx :
  ClassicalMechanics.HarmonicOscillator.InitialConditions.x₀ IC ≠ 0 ∨
    ClassicalMechanics.HarmonicOscillator.InitialConditions.v₀ IC ≠ 0
⊢ Time.deriv (ClassicalMechanics.HarmonicOscillator.InitialConditions.trajectory S IC) t = 0 ↔
    ‖ClassicalMechanics.HarmonicOscillator.InitialConditions.trajectory S IC t‖ =
      √(‖ClassicalMechanics.HarmonicOscillator.InitialConditions.x₀ IC‖ ^ 2 +
          (‖ClassicalMechanics.HarmonicOscillator.InitialConditions.v₀ IC‖ / S.ω) ^ 2)

proof:
rw [trajectory_velocity, trajectory_eq]
  simp only [Fin.isValue, Pi.add_apply, Pi.smul_apply, Pi.neg_apply, Pi.zero_apply, smul_eq_mul]
  constructor
  · intro h
    have hω : S.ω ≠ 0 := ω_neq_zero S
    have := tan_time_eq_of_trajectory_velocity_eq_zero S IC t h hx
    rw [norm_eq_abs, norm_eq_abs, norm_eq_abs]
    simp only [Fin.isValue]
    field_simp [hω]
    rw [← this, Real.tan_eq_sin_div_cos]
    field_simp [hω]
    rw [← mul_assoc, ← mul_add, ← mul_pow, ← mul_pow]
    simp [mul_comm, mul_left_comm, mul_assoc]
    ring
  · intro h
    funext i
    fin_cases i
    simp only [Fin.isValue, Pi.add_apply, Pi.smul_apply, Pi.neg_apply, Pi.zero_apply, smul_eq_mul]
    field_simp [ω_neq_zero S]
    rw [← h]
    simp [norm_eq_abs]
    ring
